lock_key.name: Lock & Key
lock_key.blurb: Players encounter a barrier, must find the key in a side area, then return to unlock it.

gambit.name: Gambit
gambit.blurb: A risky shortcut trades danger for speed; the safe route is longer but survivable.

foreshadow.name: Foreshadowing
foreshadow.blurb: Early clues hint at a later threat or secret, rewarding attentive players with preparation.

fork_choice.name: True Fork
fork_choice.blurb: Two equally valid branches with different themes or obstacles; players choose one.

pursuit.name: Pursuit
pursuit.blurb: Players are chased through the level, or hunt something that flees ahead of them.

secret_shortcut.name: Secret Shortcut
secret_shortcut.blurb: Exploration rewards players with a hidden passage that bypasses a long stretch.

hub_spoke.name: Hub & Spoke
hub_spoke.blurb: A central hub connects multiple branch areas; players clear spokes in any order.

bottleneck.name: Branch & Bottleneck
bottleneck.blurb: Parallel branches converge at a chokepoint the players must pass through.

shortcut_back.name: Shortcut Back
shortcut_back.blurb: Deep in the dungeon players discover a hidden route back to an earlier area.
